code:
import io
import string

fn join_from(_ parts: List<String>, _ start: Int) -> String
  let n = parts.len()
  mut result = ""
  mut i = start
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    let part_opt = parts.get(i)
    match part_opt
    when Some(p)
      if first
        result = p
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result}=#{p}"
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    let line_opt = io.read_line()
    match line_opt
    when Some(line)
      if string.contains(line, "=")
        let parts = string.split(line, "=")
        let key_opt = parts.get(0)
        match key_opt
        when Some(key)
          if not string.is_empty(key)
            let value = join_from(parts, 1)
            println("#{key}:#{value}")
          end
        when None
          running = false
        end
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
end
